description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu 16.04 that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-16.04 job that runs in a container with the same image, checks out the code, installs build dependencies including Qt 5.14.2, builds Laigter using qmake and make, and releases the AppImage artifact to GitHub Releases if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
